subject: Release Clamp 5.0.4
commit_message:
Release Clamp 5.0.4

Release clamp 5.0.4 containing all the fixes from CLAMP-R6 Sprint 5

Issue-ID: CLAMP-822
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: I02cf0de0569f236f56be482a301ef61121c89ffb

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 2 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 3: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Verified+1
